hero_subtitle: SFTY preserves audit-ready evidence and organizes compliance decisions with role-based access and secure workflows to support institutional trust and bank due diligence.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Enterprise compliance slows without clear evidence
problem_description: Institutional teams struggle to maintain a reliable audit trail when compliance evidence is scattered across disconnected systems and providers. This fragmentation complicates bank due diligence, weakens operational governance, and hampers defensible compliance review.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects provider outputs, role-based access controls, audit logs and compliance decisions into one secure workflow that supports institutional teams managing audit-ready governance and bank due diligence.
workflow_title: From provider outputs to audit evidence
workflow_description: SFTY structures provider results into controlled reviews, decision logs, evidence packages and audit-ready reports to support institutional compliance integrity.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented evidence. One evidence-ready layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY provides VASPs an enterprise-grade evidence integrity layer that connects compliance outputs into audit-ready workflows, preserving decisions, traceability, and secure governance for institutional trust.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs needing structured audit trails, controlled provider orchestration, bank due diligence packages and secure deployment for scalable, defensible compliance operations.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for enterprise readiness?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a compliance control layer that enhances governance, auditability and evidence integrity for regulated digital asset businesses with role-based access and secure workflows.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage compliance workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY connects provider outputs into structured workflows, enabling case management, decision logging, rule enforcement and reporting workflows within one connected compliance operating system.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and evidence packages to support audit readiness and clear documentation of compliance decisions and regulatory actions.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing tools?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY can integrate with existing KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers without replacing them, orchestrating outputs across internal compliance stacks.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY supplements existing compliance providers by turning their outputs into controlled, auditable workflows rather than replacing underlying vendor systems.
final_description: Review how SFTY supports role-based access, decision records and evidence packages for enterprise compliance and bank due diligence.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
footer_contact_title: For supervisory, compliance and deployment discussions.
footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
